item.title: akatsuky999/Waveform-EEG-AIStudio
item.description: An agentic workspace for exploring, analyzing, visualizing, and annotating EEG/iEEG signals. Includes a tool-using agent, local Python analysis, multi-scale rendering, and HDF5/EDF support.
